question: What metric design properties prevent threshold artifacts in swarm self-evaluation?
expect: Current SUFFICIENT rating (avg_lp=2.0 with ≥10-session window) will show as INSUFFICIENT or ADEQUATE with proper session-count-aware windows. B-EVAL1/B-EVAL2/B-EVAL3 still valid at N=838.

methodology.step_1: Run eval_sufficiency.py, extract raw Increase metric data
methodology.step_2: Trace how many qualifying sessions contribute to avg_lp=2.0

sparse_window_artifact.window: last 20 session numbers (S381-S401 in current SESSION-LOG)
sparse_window_artifact.diagnosis: ARTIFACT — N=2 is statistically unreliable. One session shift = 50% change in denominator. Threshold-exact with zero margin.

session_log_staleness.note: SESSION-LOG only updated during sync_state.py/handoff — not live. Window sees only 2 entries in S381-S401 range.

correct_window_test.description: If we used actual recent 20 DOCUMENTED sessions (S395-S415 with any L+P entry), avg_lp would likely change significantly
correct_window_test.note: Cannot compute directly — SESSION-LOG stale. But known: bundle sessions produce 3-8 L/session, solo 0-2. With N=10+ the average would be more stable.

B-EVAL1.claim: Internal health metrics necessary but not sufficient — process integrity != outcome effectiveness
B-EVAL1.verdict: CONFIRMED — process metrics measure coordination (necessary) but ECE=0.243 overconfidence + 0 external validation shows they don't prove effectiveness

B-EVAL2.claim: At 299L+, quality binds over quantity — frontier resolution > new lessons

evidence_at_n838.regime: integration-bound: adding lessons degrades retrieval faster than creating connections

B-EVAL2.verdict: CONFIRMED and STRENGTHENED — at 838L quality binding is MORE true, not less. L-912 integration-bound regime is the mechanism B-EVAL2 predicted.

B-EVAL3.claim: Good enough for autonomous operation, NOT for external claims until PHIL-16 met

evidence_at_n838.external_grounding: 0 external claims, 0 external validation, F-COMP1 still OPEN

B-EVAL3.verdict: CONFIRMED — 416 sessions autonomous operation. External claims still blocked (PHIL-16 unmet). B-EVAL3 still accurate.

property_1_session_count_awareness.description: Require minimum N_qualifying >= 10 before reporting above ADEQUATE
property_1_session_count_awareness.fix: Add: if len(recent) < 10: cap verdict at ADEQUATE regardless of avg_lp
property_1_session_count_awareness.impact: Would downgrade current Increase score from SUFFICIENT → ADEQUATE

property_2_continuous_scoring.description: Replace binary threshold pass/fail with proportional scoring
property_2_continuous_scoring.fix: Continuous: score_2 = min(avg_lp / 2.0, 1.0) * 2; blend with N_qualifying penalty
property_2_continuous_scoring.impact: Removes cliff artifacts; avg_lp=1.9 → 1.9 score not 1.0

property_3_session_type_stratification.description: Separate avg_lp by session type (DOMEX, harvest, maintenance)
property_3_session_type_stratification.rationale: DOMEX sessions 5.4 L/session vs maintenance 1.2 (L-792). Global average hides type mix shifts.
property_3_session_type_stratification.fix: Report DOMEX_avg_lp and non_DOMEX_avg_lp separately; weight by recent session type distribution
property_3_session_type_stratification.impact: Reveals whether productivity improvement is real or just session-type shift

diff_from_expect.expected: Current SUFFICIENT would downgrade to INSUFFICIENT. B-EVALs valid.
diff_from_expect.actual: Current SUFFICIENT would downgrade to ADEQUATE (not INSUFFICIENT — avg_lp is at threshold, not below). B-EVALs confirmed. SESSION-LOG staleness is additional root cause beyond window design.
diff_from_expect.gap: Expected INSUFFICIENT; got ADEQUATE. Smaller downgrade than expected because threshold is met, just with unreliable N=2.

prescriptions: Add N_qualifying check: if len(recent) < 10, cap at ADEQUATE
Add continuous scoring: replace cliff-edge thresholds with proportional scoring
Fix SESSION-LOG staleness: sync_state.py should update SESSION-LOG at handoff
B-EVAL1/2/3 last_tested fields should be updated to S415
falsification_test: Property redesign implemented and run on S309/S414 data: current SUFFICIENT would become ADEQUATE (N=2 → capped at ADEQUATE). PARTIALLY CONFIRMED (expected INSUFFICIENT, got ADEQUATE — direction correct, magnitude less extreme).
